name: Creole Beans and Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine scallions, cucumber, tomatoes, parsley, oil, cider vinegar, and Tabasco with the cayenne and allspice to make the salsa.
2. Heat remaining oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add onions and garlic; sauté for 2-3 minutes until fragrant.
3. Add celery and carrots; cook another 2 minutes.
4. Stir in pepper, and continue sautéing until vegetables are tender.
5. In a separate bowl, whisk together tomato paste with 1/4 cup red wine, cider vinegar, sugar, mustard, herbs, spices, salt, oregano, cayenne, and allspice.
6. Add the sauce to the skillet with the vegetables; stir well.
7. Combine beans with the vegetable mixture and stir thoroughly.
8. Bring to a simmer and cook for 30 minutes.
9. Layer hot rice and salsa over the beans in serving dishes.
10. Serve warm.
